# CARE Concrete & Corrosion Rehabilitation

CARE is a Sydney-based specialist concrete repair subcontractor serving builders, remedial contractors, engineers and asset owners across NSW.

Core services:
- Scanning, coring, cutting and preparation
- Concrete and corrosion rehabilitation
- Concrete cancer and spalling repair
- Crack injection and protective coatings
- Hardened concrete sampling and core extraction
- ITP documentation, QA records and project close-out evidence

Contact:
- Phone: 0439 766 557
- Email: info@careconstruction.com.au
- Address: 37/8 Jullian Cl, Banksmeadow NSW 2036
